    FROM `ReturnOrders` AS `r`
    WHERE NOT (`r`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`r`.`CompanyId` = @ef_filter__CurrentCompanyId)
    ORDER BY `r`.`ReturnDate` DESC
    LIMIT @p1 OFFSET @p
) AS `r0`

    SELECT `o`.`Id`, `o`.`CustomerId`, `o`.`OrderCode`
    FROM `Orders` AS `o`

    SELECT `c`.`Id`, `c`.`FullName`

) AS `c0` ON `o0`.`CustomerId` = `c0`.`Id`

    SELECT `r1`.`Id`, `r1`.`ProductId`, `p0`.`Name` AS `c`, `p0`.`Unit` AS `c0`, `r1`.`Quantity`, `r1`.`RefundPrice`, `r1`.`CompanyId`, `r1`.`CreatedBy`, `r1`.`CreatedDate`, `r1`.`DeletedBy`, `r1`.`DeletedDate`, `r1`.`IsDeleted`, `r1`.`ModifiedBy`, `r1`.`ModifiedDate`, `r1`.`ReturnOrderId`, `p0`.`Id` AS `Id0`, `p0`.`AdditionalImages`, `p0`.`Barcode`, `p0`.`CategoryId`, `p0`.`CompanyId` AS `CompanyId0`, `p0`.`CostPrice`, `p0`.`CreatedBy` AS `CreatedBy0`, `p0`.`CreatedDate` AS `CreatedDate0`, `p0`.`DeletedBy` AS `DeletedBy0`, `p0`.`DeletedDate` AS `DeletedDate0`, `p0`.`Description`, `p0`.`IsDeleted` AS `IsDeleted0`, `p0`.`MainImageUrl`, `p0`.`MaxStockLevel`, `p0`.`MinStockLevel`, `p0`.`ModifiedBy` AS `ModifiedBy0`, `p0`.`ModifiedDate` AS `ModifiedDate0`, `p0`.`Name`, `p0`.`Price`, `p0`.`Slug`, `p0`.`Status`, `p0`.`StockQuantity`, `p0`.`SupplierId`, `p0`.`Unit`, `p0`.`WholesalePrice`

        WHERE NOT (`p`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`p`.`CompanyId` = @ef_filter__CurrentCompanyId)
    ) AS `p0` ON `r1`.`ProductId` = `p0`.`Id`
    WHERE NOT (`r1`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`r1`.`CompanyId` = @ef_filter__CurrentCompanyId)
) AS `s` ON `r0`.`Id` = `s`.`ReturnOrderId`

    WHERE NOT (`r`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`r`.`CompanyId` = @ef_filter__CurrentCompanyId)
    ORDER BY `r`.`ReturnDate` DESC
    LIMIT @p1 OFFSET @p
) AS `r0`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `o`.`Id`, `o`.`CustomerId`, `o`.`OrderCode`
    FROM `Orders` AS `o`
    WHERE NOT (`o`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`o`.`CompanyId` = @ef_filter__CurrentCompanyId)
) AS `o0` ON `r0`.`OriginalOrderId` = `o0`.`Id`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`Id`, `c`.`FullName`
    FROM `Customers` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`c`.`CompanyId` = @ef_filter__CurrentCompanyId)
) AS `c0` ON `o0`.`CustomerId` = `c0`.`Id`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `r1`.`Id`, `r1`.`ProductId`, `p0`.`Name` AS `c`, `p0`.`Unit` AS `c0`, `r1`.`Quantity`, `r1`.`RefundPrice`, `r1`.`CompanyId`, `r1`.`CreatedBy`, `r1`.`CreatedDate`, `r1`.`DeletedBy`, `r1`.`DeletedDate`, `r1`.`IsDeleted`, `r1`.`ModifiedBy`, `r1`.`ModifiedDate`, `r1`.`ReturnOrderId`, `p0`.`Id` AS `Id0`, `p0`.`AdditionalImages`, `p0`.`Barcode`, `p0`.`CategoryId`, `p0`.`CompanyId` AS `CompanyId0`, `p0`.`CostPrice`, `p0`.`CreatedBy` AS `CreatedBy0`, `p0`.`CreatedDate` AS `CreatedDate0`, `p0`.`DeletedBy` AS `DeletedBy0`, `p0`.`DeletedDate` AS `DeletedDate0`, `p0`.`Description`, `p0`.`IsDeleted` AS `IsDeleted0`, `p0`.`MainImageUrl`, `p0`.`MaxStockLevel`, `p0`.`MinStockLevel`, `p0`.`ModifiedBy` AS `ModifiedBy0`, `p0`.`ModifiedDate` AS `ModifiedDate0`, `p0`.`Name`, `p0`.`Price`, `p0`.`Slug`, `p0`.`Status`, `p0`.`StockQuantity`, `p0`.`SupplierId`, `p0`.`Unit`, `p0`.`WholesalePrice`
    FROM `ReturnOrderDetails` AS `r1`
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT `p`.`Id`, `p`.`AdditionalImages`, `p`.`Barcode`, `p`.`CategoryId`, `p`.`CompanyId`, `p`.`CostPrice`, `p`.`CreatedBy`, `p`.`CreatedDate`, `p`.`DeletedBy`, `p`.`DeletedDate`, `p`.`Description`, `p`.`IsDeleted`, `p`.`MainImageUrl`, `p`.`MaxStockLevel`, `p`.`MinStockLevel`, `p`.`ModifiedBy`, `p`.`ModifiedDate`, `p`.`Name`, `p`.`Price`, `p`.`Slug`, `p`.`Status`, `p`.`StockQuantity`, `p`.`SupplierId`, `p`.`Unit`, `p`.`WholesalePrice`
        FROM `Products` AS `p`
        WHERE NOT (`p`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`p`.`CompanyId` = @ef_filter__CurrentCompanyId)
    ) AS `p0` ON `r1`.`ProductId` = `p0`.`Id`
    WHERE NOT (`r1`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`r1`.`CompanyId` = @ef_filter__CurrentCompanyId)
) AS `s` ON `r0`.`Id` = `s`.`ReturnOrderId`
ORDER BY `r0`.`ReturnDate` DESC, `r0`.`Id`, `o0`.`Id`, `c0`.`Id`, `s`.`Id`
